notes: M3 (render graph) COMPLETE — 7/7 tasks DONE, gate-green (402 files / 2253 tests) @ 2f3474b8. The active /goal 'Implement Milestone M3' is SATISFIED. M3-T7 (capstone) DONE: public addRenderPass/addComputePass/removePass user-pass API (signed-off D1 shape: declarative node + encode(ctx) callback, string-named handles, edges drive order) on WebGpuApp + createApertureApp surface; the graph post path (post-processing.ts) builds each registered pass after the scene node (resolvers map scene-color->the offscreen scene texture, depth->the depth attachment), render passes write scene-color LOAD (depth-tested overlay), compute passes dispatch in-frame, ONE command buffer, additive report.renderTargets[0].graph (order + per-pass kind/ran/executedCommands); also relaxed the graph post path to carry gpuTiming on the scene node (matching legacy) so a real-GPU app exercises the user passes. Proven by test/e2e/custom-graph-pass.spec.ts on the REAL GPU (overlay pixels + graph.order [scene, wireframe-overlay, luminance-histogram, present] + compute executedCommands>0 + histogram readback; SwiftShader+xvfb runner unavailable here) + test/webgpu/user-pass.test.ts + post-user-pass-graph.test.ts. M3-T7 commits: 7d890b57 (foundation) + 9acbfdb2 (execution proof) + 3349eb9a (live wiring) + 2a12985b (report+surface) + 2f3474b8 (example+E2E+gpuTiming). The whole render graph ships behind useFrameGraph (default OFF): single-encoder execution, declared-dependency ordering, global load/store inference, transient aliasing, TAA color history, first-class compute nodes, public user-pass API. M1/M2/M4/M5 also COMPLETE. Next ready roadmap task is M6-T1 (wave 3), OUT OF SCOPE for the satisfied M3 goal. PRIOR M3-T7 detail: M3-T7 PUBLIC API + WIRING ALL COMMITTED: 3349eb9a (live wiring: app.addRenderPass/addComputePass/removePass + userPassRegistry on WebGpuApp; post-processing.ts graph path builds registered passes after the scene node with resolvers scene-color->offscreen scene texture + depth->depth attachment, render passes write scene-color LOAD, compute dispatches in-frame, ONE command buffer, additive graph report; test/webgpu/post-user-pass-graph.test.ts), 2a12985b (graph report threaded to report.renderTargets[0].graph + createApertureApp surface = Done-when #5). REMAINING for M3-T7 done: (1) examples/custom-graph-pass.{worker,main,html}.js + scene — app with useFrameGraph + a createWebGpuCopyPostEffect present pass; app.addComputePass a luminance-histogram (own createComputePipeline + storage buffer, reads scene-color) + app.addRenderPass a depth-tested overlay (own pipeline, reads:['depth'], writes:[{scene-color, load}]); publish report.renderTargets[0].graph + histogram readback; (2) test/e2e/custom-graph-pass.spec.ts (overlay pixels + graph.order + compute ran + commandBuffers===1 = Done-when #1/#2; real-GPU headed config here, SwiftShader on cloud); (3) auto-wrap note (Done-when #4 — post path already runs effects as nodes, post-effects E2E unchanged); (4) tick Done-when + mark M3-T7 done + flip M3 row to done + Proof check. M3-T7 FOUNDATION (7d890b5): packages/webgpu/src/app/user-pass.ts — the signed-off D1 public pass shape (WebGpuAppRenderPassDescriptor/ComputePassDescriptor = name/kind/reads/writes/before/after + encode(ctx)) + WebGpuAppPassEncodeContext command-recorder/resolver + createWebGpuAppUserPassRegistry + buildUserPassNode/buildUserPassNodes (encode → RenderPassCommand[]/ComputePassCommand[] → discriminated WebGpuAppBuiltPassNode feeding the existing executor); Done-when #3 proven (test/webgpu/user-pass.test.ts). NOT yet wired to the app/live graph. M3-T7 REMAINING: (1) addRenderPass/addComputePass/removePass on the WebGpuApp interface + create-webgpu-app.ts registry + createApertureApp surface (Done-when #5); (2) execution wiring in frame-boundaries.ts (buildUserPassNodes with real GPU resolvers, insert after 'opaque', additive status.graph.order per D4); (3) custom-graph-pass example (compute histogram + wireframe overlay) + test/e2e/custom-graph-pass.spec.ts (Done-when #1/#2); (4) WebGpuPostEffect auto-wrap adapter (Done-when #4); on completion mark M3-T7 done + flip the M3 row to done + Proof ✅. PRIOR M3 DETAIL: T1 (107c61d) data model + compileFrameGraph; T2 (924003c) single-encoder executeFrameGraph + encodeFrameBoundaryInto split; T3 (1f6721f) post stack behind useFrameGraph; T4 (6aa330a) forward + multi-target through ONE encoder (incl. transmission-grab); T5 (ad296a4) all four shadow caster folds; T6 (d598e59) TAA color history through the graph as a declareHistory double-buffer pool. T6 detail: replaced TAA's ping/pong closure with createFrameGraphHistoryResource (post-color-history.ts, cache.postPasses.taaColorHistory); the graph post path admits TAA when motion vectors are available as a scene attachment (writes them as the scene node's 2nd color target), sources the TAA write from pool.current() + history read from pool.previous(), swaps once after the single execute, and declines to legacy on motion-vector fallback so WebGpuAppMotionVectorFallbackReason (computed upstream in queued-built-in-frame.ts) is unchanged. requiresColorHistory + history added to the post contract; legacy path untouched (default useFrameGraph OFF). Proofs: frame-graph-history.test.ts (compileFrameGraph two-frame: previous resolves to N-1's current, distinct buffer), post-history-graph.test.ts (route-level no-aliasing + fallback decline + pool stays 2 + swap once/frame), test/e2e/taa.spec.ts ?graph=1 (real-GPU convergence + scene-attachment motion vectors + zero validation warnings; SwiftShader+xvfb runner unavailable in this env, ran on the base headed-Chrome/Metal config). T6 detail: replaced TAA's ping/pong closure with createFrameGraphHistoryResource (post-color-history.ts, cache.postPasses.taaColorHistory); the graph post path admits TAA when motion vectors are available as a scene attachment (writes them as the scene node's 2nd color target), sources the TAA write from pool.current() + history read from pool.previous(), swaps once after the single execute, and declines to legacy on motion-vector fallback so WebGpuAppMotionVectorFallbackReason (computed upstream in queued-built-in-frame.ts) is unchanged. requiresColorHistory + history added to the post contract; legacy path untouched (default useFrameGraph OFF). Proofs: frame-graph-history.test.ts (compileFrameGraph two-frame: previous resolves to N-1's current, distinct buffer), post-history-graph.test.ts (route-level no-aliasing + fallback decline + pool stays 2 + swap once/frame), test/e2e/taa.spec.ts ?graph=1 (real-GPU convergence + scene-attachment motion vectors + zero validation warnings; SwiftShader+xvfb runner unavailable in this env, ran on the base headed-Chrome/Metal config). REMAINING: M3-T7 (capstone, LAST M3 task) — public addRenderPass/addComputePass/removePass on WebGpuApp + createApertureApp surface + a custom-pass example (compute histogram read of scene-color + depth-tested wireframe overlay after 'opaque'); API shape SIGNED OFF (M3 D1), implement exactly. On completion flip the M3 milestone row to done + Proof flag ✅. No other milestone started (per directive). M1/M2/M4/M5 COMPLETE.
